name: lattice-rbac-backend
description: Lattice RBAC backend: clone tooling, Auth claims, Cloud Functions

scripts.clone:emulator: cross-env USE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR=true FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=lattice-2026 node cloneDB.js
scripts.clone:emulator:dry-run: cross-env USE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR=true FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=lattice-2026 node cloneDB.js --dry-run
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:ai && npm run test:router
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:transform && npm run test:auth
scripts.test:phase3:emulator: cross-env USE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR=true FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=lattice-2026 node --test test/integration/phase3.test.js
scripts.predeploy: npm run test && npm run sync:functions-clone
scripts.deploy:live: npm run predeploy && cd .. && npx firebase deploy --only firestore:rbac-new-db,functions:rbac-isolated
scripts.ops:live: npm run patch:database && npm run rebuild:graph
